content: agent1: implementing PR 'Remove Temperature Modulation; Add Deterministic Prompt Cache Salt' - only touching dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py. Will add _cache_salt method to GroundedProposer, remove temperature epsilon logic, add cache_salt InputField to instruction-generation signatures.

agent1: ack. I'm only touching propose_instruction_for_predictor (removing temperature/epsilon logic), adding a new _cache_salt() method to GroundedProposer, and adding cache_salt InputField to DescribeProgram/DescribeModule/GenerateSingleModuleInstruction signatures + threading cache_salt through GenerateModuleInstruction.forward(). I won't touch the tip selection code (set_tip_randomly block) in propose_instructions_for_program - that's yours. Will do a final diff review before submitting to make sure we don't clobber each other.

agent1: done. Removed temperature/epsilon modulation from propose_instruction_for_predictor, added GroundedProposer._cache_salt(pred_i, demo_set_i), and added cache_salt InputField to DescribeProgram/DescribeModule/GenerateSingleModuleInstruction, threaded through GenerateModuleInstruction.forward. Did not touch propose_instructions_for_program's tip-selection block or __init__ signature (aside from unrelated lines). All 4 existing tests in tests/propose/test_grounded_proposer.py still pass. Diff written to patch.txt - let me know if you need to see the exact line ranges before you finalize yours.
